Pendril's Animation  

Description

1: Summon Pet: PCPetEncS01L001Anim

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 12 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 1.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Animates a weapon and shield to attack your enemies. Consumes a tiny dagger when cast.

Reagents

  • Tiny Dagger x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Pendril's Animation
  • Spell: Pendril's Animation

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Pendril's Animation
Spell: Pendril's Animation
ClassLevel
ENC1
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (18)
  • Scroll 1 Sold By (10)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
Pendril's Animation
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2023 at 2:46 AM Rating: Decent
thumpinator
1 post
The key to using this enchanter pet is to be sure to fight close to it. This pet has short arms (hehe). When i position myself so that the mob is close enough to the pet
it hit at lvl 3 & 4 for 5 to 8 damage. You can also position youself so you & your pet fights side by side,in this it will be close enough to hit. Hope this helps.
▲ Page top
Gnome
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2005 at 7:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592277335097
25 posts
os there any merchant who sells this in Ak' anon,
or will i have to go all the way to felwithe to get it??
▲ Page top
Our Pet. *snicker*
QuoteReply
# May 28 2005 at 3:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255915762
View User Forum
8 posts
[I posted this on the Wizard familiar spell forum board thingy because I saw them whining about their "pet" (which is really just a kick-butt buff), and I thought it'd do some good here too.]

Try out an enchanter pet sometime. Now -that's- useless. 1.) I can't order it to do jack squat. It just sits on it's fanny and waits for me to have the ever-loving beejeezus beaten out of me before it -considers _maybe_- helping out. 2.) I get NO BONUSES from having it cast. None. No mana regen, no resistance buffs. Nada. 3.) Even when it -does- fight, it's weak. I have to put all of my best buffs (which when i first got my most recent best buffs, my pet was too low of a level to even have them cast on it) on it for it to do a little damage (when it actually hits), and not die in two ticks (when it's actually doing enough damage to get aggro, which is usually me soloing, and then if it dies, I'm gone. X.x)

Or, I could always just charm a pet. If you snag a good one, they do a decent amount of damage (to you), can take quite a bit of damage (from you, while it's beating the int out of you), and can make good exp (which you'll lose, after it gets done killing you).

And don't even get me started on our nukes...

I'll-Enchant-U of Drinal
High Elf Jewelry Liquidation Outlet
"If I don't sell you a ring, I'll eat a bug!"

Edited, Sat May 28 16:10:00 2005
▲ Page top
RE: Our Pet. *snicker*
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2005 at 6:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771127460
13 posts
This is not the Enchanter pet. As you said, you *charm* pets as an Enchanter. The charm line makes chanters godlike soloers.

That being said, these Animations can be a great tool, but take skill to use properly. Haste them, slow the mob, off-"tank" with rune (on you), stun, etc. Like most Enchanter techniques, it takes a lot of practice, but once you get good at it, you will do a lot better than you will with a...cough...wizard ;)
▲ Page top
weird
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2004 at 5:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591808101116
6 posts
is there like a bug or something? i made a new enchanter and i can't make my pet attack sit back go away, nothing
▲ Page top
RE: weird
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2004 at 8:28 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344491328
Sage
150 posts
Thats the way chanter pets work, they won't attack until you are attacked.

HP buffs?
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2004 at 3:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790260323
5 posts
Hitpoint buffs don't seem to have any effect on my pet -- they register has having been cast on the pet, and display in the little pet-buff window, but the pet's hitpoints aren't increased -- it still only takes about 20hp of damage to go from 100% health to 0%. =(

The merchant Jeliala Glimmercharm in Euridin Palace, enchanter area sells Tiny daggers.

▲ Page top
Tiny Dagger
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2003 at 6:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966185093
8 posts
You can purchase tiny daggers from Dulia Jestes outside the Academy of Arcane Science in West Freeport. Her loc is pos 18, neg 811. approx. cost is 8 - 12 cp per dagger.
▲ Page top
Tiny Dagger
